3106120.name: Twisted To The Roots
3106120.description:
Twisted to the Roots is a short, simple experimental psychological horror game. As a gardener working at a gardener center, you encounter a customer whose strange behavior and uncanny appearance become increasingly unsettling with each visit.

You can't help but notice her strange behavior and the eerie atmosphere that surrounds her. What is wrong with her?

Key Features :

• Point & Click Mechanic
• Puzzles
• Unsettling Atmosphere
• Visual Novel Style Dialogue
3106120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
